subcodes.first_line: The Ocean of Divine meanings hath, in most times, through sheer bounty and grace, shed Its dewdrops upon that noble personage through exalted Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بحر معانی در اکثری از اوقات محض جود و فضل بانجناب ترشح نموده الواح منیعه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
